short: Anthropic's mid-2024 Claude generation, led by the Claude 3.5 Sonnet model.
definition: Claude 3.5 is the Anthropic model generation released in mid-2024, beginning with Claude 3.5 Sonnet and followed by Claude 3.5 Haiku. The generation marked a notable step up in coding, vision, and reasoning at the speed and cost of a mid-tier model, and introduced an early computer-use capability. It became widely used in developer workflows and AI coding assistants.
